session.notes: Mile repeats x3 — full recovery jog between each

adherence.summary: Plan called for workout and this landed pretty close to target.

reflection.prompt_text:
Nice one, Gabe. New run logged: 2.02 mi at 6:59/mi.

Plan check: today called for workout · 7:35/mi per repeat. Plan called for workout and this landed pretty close to target.

How'd it feel out there? Any context you want saved with the run — tired legs, wind, got sick, felt great, whatever?
